title: GUN-841 AV debut commemoration! 107kg! !! Pocha Musume Navel Festival Natsu Kondo
description: Natsu Kondo who applied for our HP to want H that changed with AV. Then I tried to make an AV debut with various chubby play to meet expectations. At the climax, a navel festival play that invites a manga artist and draws a picture on the stomach. He said he was 80kg, but he was surprised at the weight measurement of 107kg (laughs).
